name: Spinach Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the milk, flour, eggs, baking powder, and garlic. Mix well.
2. Add the chopped spinach, shredded cheese, black olives, and pepperoni to the mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Melt the butter in the bottom of a 9 x 12 pan.
4. Pour the spinach mixture into the pan, spreading it evenly.
5. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until the edges are browned. These can be eaten hot or warm; they cut easier when cooler.
